headline: Assurant (NYSE:AIZ) Reports Upbeat Q1 CY2026
summary: Insurance services company Assurant (NYSE:AIZ) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 11.3% year on year to $3.42 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $5.95 per share was 11.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
